name: Driveitaway Holdings, Inc.
business: DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. is a national dealer-focused mobility platform that enables car dealers to sell more vehicles through eCommerce with its Pay as You Go app-based subscription program. The company provides a turnkey solution with proprietary mobile technology, driver app, insurance coverages, and training to help dealerships operate in online sales opportunities.
sellsTo: entry level consumers for electric vehicles

exposures.sentence: The Company has expanded its easy and transparent consumer app subscription to ownership platform to enable entry level consumers to drive and acquire new Electric Vehicles.

catalysts.event: Add at least 8 more cities in Q1 2026
catalysts.sentence: With the additional nine cities added in December 2025, DriveItAway now operates in 15 cities across the US, and we look to add at least another 8 more in the first quarter of 2026.
